summary: Detailed implementation plan for Part 1: WhatsApp Chatbot improvements. Covers response time optimization (fast-path for trivial inputs, single combined LLM calls), full multi-language support for all 5 language modes, CV-at-any-state feature, engagement/persuasion messaging, hotline last-resort logic, job vacancies scenario improvements, and Ask-a-Question baseline. Includes file-by-file change breakdown and verification plan.
